description: Build and maintain Docebo’s marketing sites with modern WordPress development, taking increased ownership of technical strategy and system architecture. Develop custom Gutenberg blocks in React, manage database operations with WP CLI, and prioritize scalability and performance. Collaborate with design, marketing, and product teams while exploring AI-driven workflows for content and optimization.

Built and maintained Docebo’s marketing sites with modern WordPress development. Developed custom Gutenberg blocks in React, managed database operations with WP CLI, and prioritized scalability and performance. Collaborated with design, marketing, and product teams while exploring AI-driven workflows for content and optimization.

Co-chair the board and lead event organization across Toronto’s tech ecosystem. Spearhead Code Diversity (monthly community gatherings for women and gender-diverse folks in tech), Tech Talks, Build Night TO, and other initiatives. Helped bring TechTank programming to Toronto Tech Week 2025 and guide strategic direction for community programming.

Serve as secretary on the board of Life After Burns, supporting the organization’s mission to help burn survivors heal and rebuild their lives. Contribute to strategic planning and governance while helping coordinate board communications and initiatives.
Develop and maintain lead-generation websites using modern frameworks, with a strong focus on clean code, accessibility, and performance optimization.

Coordinated and led user experience sessions with internal and external users for the development of a new Project Lifecycle Management system. Conducted user acceptance testing managed with JIRA, ensured packaging portal requirements were met, and led daily UX team meetings.

Managed and grew the Loblaw Brand Printer Program, collaborated with printers to ensure high-quality printing, and improved packaging specifications for sustainability initiatives. Achieved 100% compliance for new product specifications and led data integrity improvements for new systems.

Managed packaging and collateral projects for multiple large clients across various industries. Coordinated with design, color, and prepress teams while maintaining client relationships and managing project timelines using graphics approval systems.
Assisted with web project management, performed QA on deliverables, and ensured accurate invoicing and project documentation. Created and executed project work plans, adapting to changing needs.
